title: Britannia Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Britannia Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
